drills.name: Timed sequence completion drill
drills.description: Practice the complete intracorporeal sequence from needle loading to final knot in 3-minute intervals, focusing on smooth transitions between phases.
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to complete the task within time constraints

drills.name: Performance pressure simulation
drills.description: Execute 10 complete knot sequences with a timer visible, gradually reducing target time from 4 minutes to 2.5 minutes.
drills.targets_weakness: Missing the transition from practice to timed performance

progression_note: Your technique fundamentals are solid, but you need to bridge the gap between demonstration and performance. Focus on completing full timed attempts rather than step-by-step practice to build confidence and speed.
